purpose: Stage and launch Salt2 Jin refined-mesh closure-QOI smoke and overnight processing under srun without mutating imported solver outputs.

source_cases.role: overnight target after medium smoke clears

live_execution.final_state: medium and fine extraction completed during interactive srun chain by 2026-07-09T16:58:31-05:00

cancelled_batch_rerun.reason: Would have rerun the same completed smoke_then_overnight extraction and produced no new analysis stage.

validation: python3.11 -c "import tools.analyze.test_salt2_fine_closure_qoi_smoke as t; t.test_generator_outputs_expected_contract(); t.test_generated_runner_keeps_source_case_read_only(); print('manual assertions passed')"
notes: Refined medium/fine source IDs are not registered in tools.case_analysis_profiles; the runner uses the Salt2 Jin coarse profile only as the station/segment contract and records physical medium/fine provenance separately.

The first tmux run failed during medium reconstructPar because staged controlDict included system/functions after the runner removed that file. The generator now writes an empty include-compatible system/functions file in the staged reconstruction mirror.
